name: diagGetTesterPresentState
title: diagGetTesterPresentState
description: Returns the state of autonomous/cyclical Tester Present requests from CANoe to the specified or current ECU.
This function only returns the correct state if in the calling CAPL node no CAPL Callback interface for diagnostics is used.
0: sending Tester Present disabled for target ECU1: sending Tester Present enabled for target ECU

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU as specified in the diagnostic configuration dialog, for which the Tester Present state shall be queried.
